name: ahoo-skills
description: Codex and Claude Code skills marketplace for Ahoo-Wang open source projects

scripts.sync: bash -c 'bash scripts/sync-sources.sh; code=$?; if [ $code -ne 0 ] && [ $code -ne 2 ]; then exit $code; fi; bash scripts/generate-plugins.sh'
scripts.test: bash scripts/test-sync-skills.sh && bash scripts/test-generate-plugins.sh && bash scripts/validate-skills.sh && node scripts/test-pages-i18n.mjs
